assertions.title: Provider secrets are absent from the guest VM

steps.expected: Provider credentials stored only on host at /var/lib/go-choir/gateway-provider.env
steps.observed: Host-side file exists at /var/lib/go-choir/gateway-provider.env containing ZAI_API_KEY and FIREWORKS_API_KEY

steps.expected: Guest image explicitly excludes provider credentials from derivation
steps.observed: nix/guest-image.nix contains multiple comments confirming VAL-VM-011 compliance: 'Provider credentials, gateway secrets, auth signing keys, and other host-side material are explicitly excluded from the guest'

steps.expected: Guest filesystem contains only sandbox binary, init script, and minimal utilities - no credentials
steps.observed: Guest rootfs contains only: sandbox binary, ip, sh, mount, mkdir, cat, echo, cut, grep, resolv.conf. No credential files or API keys.

steps.expected: Boot arguments contain only guest_port, vm_id, epoch, and network config - no secrets
steps.observed: fc-config.json shows boot_args: 'console=ttyS0 reboot=k panic=1 pci=off root=/dev/vda rw init=/bin/init guest_port=8085 persistent=/mnt/persistent vm_id=vm-... epoch=1 ip=172.1.0.2::172.1.0.1:255.255.255.252::eth0:off' - no API keys or credentials

steps.action: Verify only gateway token present in guest
steps.expected: Only RUNTIME_GATEWAY_TOKEN for auth to host gateway, no provider credentials
steps.observed: Host-side sandbox process has RUNTIME_GATEWAY_TOKEN and RUNTIME_GATEWAY_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8084, but NO ZAI_API_KEY or FIREWORKS_API_KEY

internal/vmmanager/manager.go:361-627 confirms: 'Provider credentials are explicitly NOT included in this configuration. The guest environment, boot_args, and drives contain only the minimum bootstrap material (VAL-VM-011)'

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. Provider secrets (ZAI_API_KEY, FIREWORKS_API_KEY) are confirmed absent from the guest VM. Only the gateway token (RUNTIME_GATEWAY_TOKEN) is present for auth to the host gateway. Guest image, boot args, and filesystem have been verified to contain no credential material.
